title: Yeh Haseen Waadiyan
info: Scale: D Natural (works on any Sa)
Notes System: S R G Ma(t) P Dha(k) Ni (k = komal, t = tivra)

lines.indian: Dha Ni Re Sa Re Sa Re Ni...
lines.western: A B D C D C D B...

lines.indian: Dha Ni Ni Ga.. Re Sa Sa Re Re Ni
lines.western: A B B E.. D C C D D B

lines.indian: Dha Ni Ga Ga Re Ma(T) Ma(T) Ga Re Re(k) Re Re(k) Re Re(k) Ni
lines.western: A B E E D F# F# E D Db D Db D Db B

lines.indian: Ma(T) Dha(k) Dha........ Dha(k) Dha Dha(k)... Ga Re(k)
lines.western: F# Ab A........ Ab A Ab... E Db

lines.indian: Re(k) Re(k) Ma(T).. Dha(k)... Dha.. Ni..........
